content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market weakness with Nifty -0.81%, IT collapsing -3.42% on INFY guidance cut, VIX spiking +3.8% to 19.3. Book is 79% deployed leaving only ~INR 14K headroom — we are in deployment hysteresis mode. Priority is managing existing positions, trailing SLs on winners, and NOT adding new risk.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down -5.9% but SL at 75 still intact (CMP 76.66). Strong Q4 print (+34.9% PAT) and PSU bank sector +15% MTD supports thesis. Post-results profit-taking expected. SL at 75 is already tight relative to entry — cannot tighten further without risking whipsaw exit. Let SL do its job."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 984.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven (984 = entry), target unchanged. This is a no-op; emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge position. -1.4% unrealized, SL at 119 well below CMP 123.39. With VIX rising and macro uncertainty, gold hedge stays intact. No trail needed — SL already well-placed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1665.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Best performer +3.4%. Current SL at 1704.81 is ABOVE CMP 1696.50 — this is already triggered/invalid. Need to LOWER SL to valid level. Wait — rule says SL can only be tightened. But current SL is already above CMP meaning it should have triggered. Reconsidering: leaving SL as-is at 1704.81 will exit position at market open. Actually the position is live so SL must be below CMP for a long. This requires manual review — emit HOLD and let the system resolve."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+0.6% unrealized, holding up well (+1.16% today) on strong Q4 beat. SL at 1385 is -2.6% from entry, not yet at trail threshold (need +2% unrealized to move to BE). Keep current SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+1.1%, near 52w high showing exceptional relative strength. Q4 results on Apr 27 is binary event. SL at 1030 gives ~2.8% room. Not yet at +2% trail trigger. Hold through results."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+1.4%, near 52w high. Not yet at +2% trail threshold. SL at 665 = -2.3% from entry, adequate."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-1.2% unrealized. SL at 2260 gives -4.7% room — wide but within SL cap. Q4 results Apr 30 as catalyst. Keep SL intact; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-1.0%, SL at 388 = -4.1% from entry. Summer peak demand catalyst intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Flat. SL at 205 = -4.2% from entry. Q4 results Apr 29 with street expecting -12% PAT YoY — binary event. Stock already above consensus target Rs 177. Monitoring closely. SL already at max acceptable width."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 75 below CMP 76.66. Thesis (strong Q4, PSU bank momentum) intact despite drawdown."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven from entry day. At +2.6%, not yet at +4% threshold for tightening further. Let the position breathe toward 1100 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position, SL well-placed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1704.81 is currently ABOVE CMP 1696.50 — this anomaly will likely trigger exit on next tick if price doesn't recover. Cannot loosen SL per rules. Will let the SL take us out if it hits, preserving gains."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+0.6%, below +2% trail threshold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+1.1%, below trail threshold. Q4 event Apr 27."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+1.4%, below trail threshold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Underwater, SL intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Underwater, SL intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat, pre-results Apr 29. SL at 205."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "ICICIBANK clean Q4 beat at CMP ~1333 is attractive but no cash available. EMCURE +3.7% on Roche deal momentum but stock at 52w high — chase risk. CLEAN 12.8x volume anomaly — regulatory/results uncertainty, avoid. IEX major regulatory overhang from CERC market coupling draft — AVOID. INFY falling knife, skip.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 79% deployed — at the ceiling. Only INR 14K deployable remaining. Multiple binary events ahead: AUBANK Q4 Apr 27, COALINDIA Apr 27, ADANIPOWER Apr 29, HUL Apr 30. Cluster risk: TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER = 3 names in power/energy cluster (~INR 150K combined, ~15% of book) — at acceptable level but no more power adds. Financials cluster: MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK (~INR 370K, 37% of book) — over the cluster soft cap. NO new financials. NO_ACTION on new entries until cash headroom or cluster concentration improves. Focus next 2-3 sessions on managing event-driven exits."
}
